title: Debrief: Finish & get verdict -> generateObject scorecard + callbacks + revealed reference + persist
description: Finish & get verdict produces a Zod-typed scorecard via generateObject: per-rubric ratings+comments, one-line verdict (advance/borderline/not yet), 2-3 transcript callbacks, expandable revealed reference (one strong approach). Persist the full attempt row. Acceptance: verdict renders from structured data; attempt saved to DB.

title: Turn-based review loop: Request-review route handler + thread UI + per-turn snapshot
description: Route handler that on Request review serializes current canvas (full snapshot) + optional written reply + prior transcript and streams reviewer comments (streamText) in a London-startup interviewer persona grounded by hidden rubric/reference. Review thread UI beside canvas; user can edit board and reply each turn; re-review repeats. Soft wind-down ~5-7 turns, hard cap ~10. Acceptance: full turn cycle works end to end against a seed problem.

title: LLM provider layer: AI SDK swappable across Gemini/Anthropic/OpenAI by env key
description: Vercel AI SDK provider abstraction selecting Gemini/Anthropic/OpenAI by whichever of GEMINI_API_KEY/ANTHROPIC_API_KEY/OPENAI_API_KEY is present. Server-side only. Helpers for streamText and generateObject. Acceptance: switching env key switches provider; browser never receives a key.

title: Canvas: tldraw integration with 12 custom component shapes + explanations + notes + directed arrows
description: Integrate tldraw. Custom ShapeUtil per component type (Service, Worker, Queue/Stream, SQL DB, NoSQL, Cache, Object storage, Gateway/LB, Third-party API, LLM provider, Webhook source, Cron, Custom). Each shape has an optional explanation prop. Drag-from-palette, directed arrows, global train-of-thought notes panel. Acceptance: can drag, connect with directed arrows, edit per-box explanation + notes.

title: Serialization adapter: tldraw store -> {nodes,edges,notes} JSON (tested)
description: First-class, unit-tested adapter converting the tldraw store (custom shapes + arrow bindings) into clean directed { nodes, edges, notes } JSON for the LLM. Critique quality depends on this. Acceptance: tests cover topology, direction, explanations, notes; round-trips representative boards.

title: Data model: Drizzle attempts schema + Zod scorecard + problem types + 1 seed problem
description: Drizzle schema for attempts (userId, problemId, tldraw snapshot JSON, graph JSON, transcript JSON, scorecard JSON, verdict, createdAt). Zod scorecard schema shared by AI SDK/DB/UI. Problem TS type. One sample static server-only seed problem. Acceptance: migration applies, types compile, sample problem imports server-side only.

title: Auth: Better Auth + GitHub OAuth + session
description: Better Auth with GitHub OAuth via the Drizzle adapter. Sessions, users table managed by Better Auth. Gives a userId to hang attempts off. Acceptance: sign in with GitHub, session persists, userId available server-side.

title: [Epic] arch-btw v1: system-design interview canvas
description: Single-player portfolio + learning tool. Drag prefab components onto a tldraw canvas, connect with directed arrows, explain each box, then defend the design in a turn-based PR-review loop with an LLM interviewer (London-startup style, not FAANG). Ends in a structured scorecard debrief. See mempalace wing arch-btw/decisions for full design.

title: Project scaffold: Next.js App Router + TS strict + Tailwind/shadcn + Drizzle + Neon
description: Bootstrap the app: Next.js App Router (latest stable, React 19), TypeScript strict, Tailwind + shadcn/ui, Drizzle ORM wired to Neon Postgres, env config (.env with LLM keys, GitHub OAuth, Neon URL, Better Auth secret). Acceptance: app builds, connects to Neon, shadcn component renders.

title: Author 6 curated seed problems (2 easy / 2 medium / 2 hard)
description: LLM-draft then human-curate 6 feature/integration/AI-agent flavored problems, each with prompt, canned clarification facts, hidden rubric, hidden reference. Stored as static server-only typed files. Acceptance: 6 problems validate against the problem schema and load server-side.

title: Deploy to Vercel + env/secrets wiring
description: Deploy to Vercel with Neon, GitHub OAuth, Better Auth secret, and the chosen LLM key configured. Verify streaming review turns work on Vercel. Acceptance: production deploy completes a full review loop + debrief.

title: Progress view: list past attempts and scores over time
description: Authenticated view listing the user past attempts per problem with verdicts and rubric scores over time. Acceptance: attempts list renders for the signed-in user.

title: Clarification beat: optional pre-design Q&A from canned facts
description: Before/while designing, user can ask clarifying questions; interviewer answers consistently from the problem canned clarification facts. Acceptance: asking a clarifying question returns an in-character answer grounded only in canned facts.
